_comment: Hooks for the Dutch Loan-Tape Analyzer harness. Each hook implements one rule from .claude/CLAUDE.md or docs/governance/fail-gracefully.md.

PostToolUse._comment: After every Edit/Write to a Python file, run ruff format and ruff check --fix. Keeps the diff small and the code consistent.

Stop._comment: On Claude stop, run pytest -x --ff on changed test files. Enforces the Iron Law: no claim of done without a green test.

_pre_commit_note: PreCommit guards live under .claude/hooks/ and are wired via git pre-commit (see scripts/install-hooks.sh): precommit_tdd_guard.py, precommit_ai_trailer.py, precommit_mass_rewrite_guard.py, precommit_secrets.py.
